description: You are a Network Planning Analyst for a regional airline. Complete the 'Route_Financials' sheet in 'airline_profitability.xlsx' (columns F through M) to identify routes losing money, using the reference data provided in the 'Fleet_Specs' sheet. For each route, determine the Seats based on Aircraft Type, Available Seat Miles (ASM), Revenue Passenger Miles (RPM), and Load Factor (formatted as a percentage). Calculate the Total Revenue using passenger counts, average fares, and ancillary revenue. Determine the Total Cost by calculating flight duration (Distance divided by Average Block Speed) and multiplying by the Hourly Operating Cost. Record the Operating Margin and set the Profitability status to "REVIEW" for routes with a negative margin and "OK" for all others. Save the changes to 'airline_profitability.xlsx'.
